svg.title: How Goose works — the full mental model
svg.desc: Layered architecture showing: you send a task, Goose's LLM brain plans it, dispatches to extensions/MCP tools, gets results, loops until done, then reports back. Light model handles quick tool calls, heavy model handles planning and analysis.
svg.text: Actual programs executed on your machine
Model routing — router proxy on port 7000 decides which model to use
